**Overview**

This dashboard provides an overview of the Zero Trust events collected from the Cloudflare Logpush integration. Zero Trust events cover the following list:

- Access Requests
- Audit
- CASB
- Device Posture
- Gateway DNS
- Gateway HTTP
- Gateway Network
- Network Sessions

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/cloudflare_logpush/overview)
